name: Spicy Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds new potatoes, cut into bite-size chunks
1 red bell pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart saucepan over high heat, bring water to boiling. Add potatoes and Tabasco crab boil.
2. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 15 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
3. Drain the mixture and let it cool slightly.
4. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, milk, salt, and Tabasco sauce.
5. Add cooked potatoes, celery, and red pepper; toss to mix well.
6. Makes 6 servings.
